name: Chicken Breasts a L'orange
recipeIngredient: 3 sweet potatoes (or 2), cut into 1/4 inch slices
10.75 oz can cream of celery soup or cream of chicken soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the chicken breasts and pat them dry.
2. Combine 2/3 cup flour with salt, nutmeg, cinnamon, pepper, and garlic powder to coat the chicken thoroughly.
3. Place sweet potato slices at the bottom of a Crock-Pot.
4. Arrange chicken breasts on top of the sweet potatoes.
5. In a separate bowl, combine soup with remaining ingredients except buttered rice; stir well.
6. Pour the soup mixture over the chicken breasts.
7. Cover and cook on Low for 8 to 10 hours or on High for 3 to 4 hours until chicken and vegetables are tender.
8. Serve chicken and sauce over hot buttered rice.
Serves 6
